title: Pan-Seared Cod Tacos
description: A flavorful and healthy twist on traditional tacos, featuring pan-seared cod and served with a gluten-free slaw.
instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add cod fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer cooked cod to a plate and set aside.
Add gluten-free taco seasoning to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add lime juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add shredded cabbage to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until slightly softened.
Warm griddled corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble tacos by placing cooked cod on a tortilla, topping with cabbage mixture, and garnishing with cilantro.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
